name: The Coin-Flip Cabinet of Curiosities
text:
Whenever a player flips one or more coins, exile the top card of your library face down and put a Curio counter on The Coin-Flip Cabinet of Curiosities.
{1}, {T}: Flip a coin. If you win, put a card you own exiled with the Cabinet into your hand. If you lose, the drawer sticks; try again next time.
flavorText: Behind glass: a two-headed coin, a die that only rolls 7, and the soul of a former cashier.

extras.dice: feeds off the whole table's coin flips
